[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000000 1
1 0111010 4
2 0011010 3
3 1011101 5
4 0101111 5
5 1111010 5
6 1101010 4
7 1001010 3

70 07 1101010 4 match 6
